notes: Billing confirmation URLs and delegated access tokens are synthetic local values. Raw delegated token values are intentionally absent from meta-visible state.

Live success-path captures for billing approval, app uninstall, access-scope revocation, and delegated-token creation/destruction remain blocked unless a disposable app/store credential is explicitly approved for those external effects.

mutationPayloads: appSubscriptionCreate returns a PENDING staged subscription, usage line item, empty userErrors, and a synthetic confirmationUrl.
appPurchaseOneTimeCreate returns a PENDING staged one-time purchase, empty userErrors, and a synthetic confirmationUrl.
appSubscriptionLineItemUpdate returns the staged subscription and a synthetic confirmationUrl.
appUsageRecordCreate returns a staged usage record linked to the staged usage line item.
appSubscriptionCancel returns the staged subscription with status CANCELLED.
downstreamReads: currentAppInstallation.allSubscriptions reads the staged subscription and usage record.
currentAppInstallation.oneTimePurchases reads the staged one-time purchase.
currentAppInstallation.activeSubscriptions stays empty for pending/cancelled local billing.

mutationPayloads: appRevokeAccessScopes returns revoked access scope handles plus userErrors for unknown/not-granted scopes.
appUninstall returns the staged app object.
downstreamReads: currentAppInstallation returns null after staged appUninstall.

mutationPayloads: delegateAccessTokenCreate returns the synthetic raw token once with accessScopes and expiresIn.
delegateAccessTokenDestroy returns status true for the staged token and status false with ACCESS_TOKEN_NOT_FOUND when repeated.
secretHandling: Meta-visible delegatedAccessTokens store accessTokenSha256 and accessTokenPreview only.
The raw synthetic token returned by delegateAccessTokenCreate is not serialized in __meta/state.
